title: Farr (disambiguation)
content:
[[File:SenatorOnacondaFarr-NotableRodians.png|thumb|250px|right|Senator Onaconda Farr]]
'''Farr''' may refer to:

==[[Canon]]==
*'''[[Onaconda Farr]]''', [[Rodian]] [[senator]] for the [[Galactic Republic]]'s [[Savareen sector]]
*'''[[Samoc Farr]]''', [[Rogue Squadron|Rogue]] and sister of Toryn
*'''[[Toryn Farr]]''', [[Chandrilan]] [[Communications officer/Legends|communications officer]] in service with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic]]

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*'''[[Brann Lo-Farr]]'''
*'''[[Farr Orjul]]'''
*'''[[Jastus Farr]]'''
*'''[[Needo Farr]]'''
*'''[[Onaconda Farr/Legends|Onaconda Farr]]'''
*'''[[Samoc Farr/Legends|Samoc Farr]]'''
*'''[[Toryn Farr/Legends|Toryn Farr]]'''

==Real world==
*'''[[Robert Farr]]'''
